answers.text: 当前选中对象包括 Preheater (heater-2) 及其进出口流股 feed-6、product-6。诊断显示 feed-6 缺少温度规格（error），heater-2 的出口效应尚未确认为独立根因（warning）。由于 warning 明确指出出口异常可能受上游不确定性影响、尚不构成独立根因，因此本次仅针对有直接诊断支撑且可操作的 feed-6 温度缺失问题生成候选补全提案；heater-2 的 warning 暂不触发独立 patch，待上游规格补全并重新求解后再行评估。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Preheater Feed 补充温度占位规格
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 feed-6 缺少温度规格。补充一个温度占位值可使加热器入口热力学状态完整，有助于求解器从 partial_convergence 向完全收敛推进。占位值 25 °C 为常见环境温度假设，用户应根据实际工况确认或修改。

issues.message: Preheater Feed is missing temperature specification.
The current outlet response may still be influenced by upstream uncertainty, so the heater effect is not yet confirmed as a separate root cause.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Preheater Feed is missing temperature specification.

citations.label: 诊断 HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: The current outlet response may still be influenced by upstream uncertainty, so the heater effect is not yet confirmed as a separate root cause.
